assertionResults.title: renders DiaryFeed and "Add New Grind" button by default

assertionResults.fullName: App Component clicking "Add New Grind" button shows AddEntryForm and "Back to Feed" button

assertionResults.fullName: App Component adding a new entry via form switches back to DiaryFeed view
assertionResults.title: adding a new entry via form switches back to DiaryFeed view

assertionResults.title: renders social interaction buttons

assertionResults.title: share button logs to console
